decision: Fork plugin by pointing installed_plugins.json to source repo instead of cache
rationale: Plugin cache is non-durable — edits get wiped on cache refresh. Source repo at C:\Users\sungoyal\project-memory is version-controlled and durable.

decision: Use ONNX MiniLM-L6 embeddings as primary search — no BM25 fallback
rationale: @huggingface/transformers is a hard dependency installed with the plugin. Embeddings are the only search mechanism.
